text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has managed to leave quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Teach, let's have a one-on-one!

I'm taken off guard when Hishi Amazon asks me
for a one-on-one out of the blue.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't look so scared. I'm not askin' for a race.
Wouldn't be fair since our physical abilities are
night and day.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't have to be a race at all! Whatever we
do's fine, but I just wanna compete with you!
choice_data_list: What's this all of a sudden?
What's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
With everything done and over, I was reflecting
on these past three years... and how you've grown
a lot too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And then I thought it'd be real fun to have a li'l
battle with you, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong? Not interested in duking it out
with me?

I don't really have a reason to refuse, so I accept
her challenge.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nice! The arcade is the best place to go when it
comes to competitions, since there are a ton of
games to choose from!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep the rules simple and make this a best
out of three deal!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If you win, I'll cook you somethin' tasty every day
for a week! Whatever you want!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And if you lose... Hm, let's see...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You'll have to treat all my dorm residents to that
carrot roll cake that's been trending everywhere!
And so, our one-on-one begins...
Clunk!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, five points to me! Hehe, how do you like
them apples?

First up is air hockey. It's one of my picks since it
doesn't require much physical strength, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Graah! Woo! And that settles it—match point!

Hishi Amazon beats me, no contest. It's a little
frustrating, but I reset my mental for our second
game...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! I fell off the cliff again!

This time, we're playing a racing game. It doesn't
look like Hishi Amazon is very used to this type of
game, and is struggling hard.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I just need to stay calm! Keep a cool head, and
this'll be easy as cake!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, pedal to the metal time! First place is mine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wait... I lost? I was going in the wrong direction?!

I manage to win the car race thanks to her
mistake! It's time to decide what to do for our
final battle.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... We could play a shooting game. There's a
punching machine too... So many choices.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But none of 'em are clickin' with me! This isn't the
kind of one-on-one I want...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I just want to face you head on, no holds barred.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, that gives me an idea. How about we
arm wrestle?!

I try to change her mind by telling her how it'd be
a waste to come to an arcade and not choose any
of the games.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's all good! Don't sweat the small stuff!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well... I do have quite the advantage here, so I'll
give you a leg up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll just use this one finger, and you can use both
hands... No, come at me with all your strength!

Surely, I can't lose when she's at such a
disadvantage. After pumping myself up, we start
the match!
However...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, haven't those two been arm wrestling for
like... thirty minutes already?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be jerking my chain... They're
completely drenched in sweat.

The handicap she gave me is perhaps a little too
good, because we've been locked in a stalemate
for quite some time.

I muster up the last of my strength and channel
my entire weight into my arms. Hishi Amazon's
arm starts to lower to the ground.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Tch! Not too bad, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But... I'm just gettin' started!

Hishi Amazon gives a mighty laugh... and my arms
grow heavier in an instant.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Raaahhh!

She flips the battle on its head with one quick
burst of energy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Now that's what I call a one-on-one! Thanks
for the good time, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I got chills seein' how determined you were.
You're pretty good.

I've always known that Hishi Amazon isn't the
type to give up. She never fails to push her way
through even the most insurmountable walls.

But experiencing that strength for myself is
nothing like watching her from the spectator
stands.
choice_data_list: (I can't believe she used that much power just for a friendly arm wrestling match with me...)

text_block_list.text:
Despite my disbelief, I know today's display was
nothing compared to her dogged determination
to win during her races.

We've been on a non-stop journey for three
whole years.

And it's taken me this long to fully process how
amazing she is.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Teach, you're spacing out. Something up?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what're you buttering me up for? Flattery
isn't gonna get you anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Besides... from my perspective, you're the
incredible one.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You've worked hard to lead us to victory these
past three years. I should know, as someone who's
stuck by your side all this time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to keep up that passion and drive unless
you're real determined and committed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Over the years, your motivation has inspired me
so many times.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I've only made it this far thanks to you.
I'm starting to think that the two of us...
choice_data_list: (Are a lot more alike than I previously thought.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Well... Here's to more adventures, partner!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Right back at you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What? What're you laughing at, Teach?!

Hishi Amazon and I resume our journey, this time
embarking for newer and even greater heights.
